patterns.title: Fail-fast API input validation with schema boundary
patterns.description: Validate and normalize request payloads at route boundaries before domain logic runs. Return explicit 4xx errors with actionable messages and avoid partial execution on invalid inputs.

patterns.title: Two-key fallback for cloud inference reliability
patterns.description: Use primary and backup API keys with bounded retries per key, handle 429 with backoff, and rotate to secondary key before degrading to backup models.

patterns.title: Triple-pass answer QA with retrieval escalation
patterns.description: Generate primary answer, verify with independent model, and if uncertainty detected escalate to web-augmented retrieval before final response. Expose confidence and quality gate status in response metadata.
